name: wargus-typescript
description: Browser-native TypeScript/PixiJS port of the Wargus/Warcraft II RTS engine.

scripts.verify:browser-production-smoke: npm run build && WARGUS_BROWSER_SMOKE_SERVER=preview node scripts/verify-browser-runtime-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify:browser-production: npm run verify:browser-production-smoke && WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_SERVER=preview node scripts/verify-browser-map-loads.mjs
scripts.verify:browser-production:all: npm run verify:browser-production-smoke && WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_SERVER=preview WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_LOADS=all node scripts/verify-browser-map-loads.mjs
scripts.verify:browser-demo-session: npm run verify:browser-fixed-demo-input && WARGUS_BROWSER_HARVEST_MAP="maps/ladder/Garden of war BNE.pud.smp.gz" npm run verify:browser-harvest-session && WARGUS_BROWSER_TRAIN_MAP="maps/ladder/Garden of war BNE.pud.smp.gz" npm run verify:browser-train-session && npm run verify:browser-demo-victory
scripts.verify:browser-production-map-loads: npm run build && WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_SERVER=preview node scripts/verify-browser-map-loads.mjs
scripts.verify:browser-production-map-loads:all: npm run build && WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_SERVER=preview WARGUS_BROWSER_MAP_LOADS=all node scripts/verify-browser-map-loads.mjs
scripts.verify:browser-native-viewport: node scripts/verify-browser-native-viewport.mjs && npm run verify:source-video-fullscreen && npm run verify:source-viewport-mode
